title: FLUX Cross-Runtime Conformance Framework
description: Schema definitions for the FLUX cross-runtime conformance testing framework. Covers test vectors, run results, suite manifests, runtime descriptors, and conformance reports.

isa_version.description: ISA version identifier. isa-v1 = runtime opcodes.py (HALT=0x80, 5 formats A-E,G). isa-v2 = unified spec isa_unified.py (HALT=0x00, 7 formats A-G).

encoding_format.description: Instruction encoding format. Note: same letter may have different byte sizes across ISA versions (e.g., C is 3B in isa-v1 but 2B in isa-v2).

register_snapshot.description: Register values keyed by register index (string).

memory_snapshot.description: Memory contents keyed by region name.

additionalProperties.description: Memory offsets keyed by integer offset (string), values as hex strings.

TestVector.title: FLUX Conformance Test Vector
TestVector.description: A single test vector defining bytecode input, preconditions, and expected results. Extends the existing test-vector-schema.json with ISA versioning, multi-encoding support, and runtime requirement declarations.

tags.description: Classification tags. p0 = must-pass gate. isa-v1/isa-v2 = ISA version compatibility markers.

isa_versions.description: ISA versions this vector provides bytecode encodings for.

required_formats.description: Instruction formats this vector exercises. Used for coverage analysis.

oneOf.description: Single ISA version bytecode hex (backward-compatible shorthand, assumed isa-v1).

additionalProperties.description: Raw bytecode as hex string for this ISA version.

bytecode.description: Bytecode encodings. Either a single hex string (isa-v1) or a map of isa_version -> hex_string.

preconditions.description: Register/memory state to set before execution.

runtime_requirements.description: Capabilities a runtime must support to run this vector.

min_registers_gp.description: Minimum number of general-purpose registers required.

min_registers_fp.description: Minimum number of floating-point registers required.

requires_a2a.description: Whether the runtime must support A2A protocol operations.

requires_simd.description: Whether the runtime must support SIMD/vector operations.

requires_regions.description: Whether the runtime must support named memory regions.

max_cycles.description: Maximum execution cycles before CYCLE_LIMIT state.

gp.description: Expected GP register values. Only registers that must be checked need listing.

max_cycles.description: Maximum cycles allowed. Execution exceeding this should yield CYCLE_LIMIT.

error_type.description: If final_state is ERRORED, the expected error class (e.g., 'DivisionByZero', 'StackOverflow', 'InvalidOpcode').

TestRunResult.title: FLUX Conformance Test Run Result
TestRunResult.description: Result of executing a single test vector against a specific runtime. Emitted by the runner adapter after execution and validation.

vector_id.description: ID of the test vector that was run.

isa_version.description: ISA version used for this run.

verdict.description: Test verdict. PASS = all postconditions met. FAIL = state mismatch. SKIP = runtime lacks required capability. ERROR = runtime crashed or timed out.

cycle_count.description: Actual cycles consumed by the VM, if measured.

memory_usage_bytes.description: Peak memory usage during execution, if measured.

expected_state.description: The expected final VM state from the test vector.

actual_state.description: The actual final VM state produced by the runtime.

register_mismatches.description: Register values that did not match expectations.

flag_mismatches.description: Flag values that did not match expectations.

skip_reason.description: If verdict is SKIP, the reason (e.g., 'unsupported format F', 'no A2A support').

error_message.description: If verdict is ERROR, the runtime error or crash message.

details.description: Free-form human-readable details about the run.

TestSuiteManifest.title: FLUX Conformance Test Suite Manifest
TestSuiteManifest.description: Complete manifest of all test vectors in a conformance suite, with metadata for versioning and coverage tracking.

schema_version.description: Version of this manifest schema format.

manifest_version.description: Semantic version of this manifest. Bumped when vectors are added/modified/removed.

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this manifest was generated.

generated_by.description: Tool or agent that generated this manifest.

isa_versions.description: ISA versions that vectors in this suite target.
ISA versions this vector provides bytecode for.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the vector JSON file for integrity verification.

vectors.description: Ordered list of all test vectors in the suite.

additionalProperties.description: List of vector IDs in this category.

format_coverage.description: Number of vectors exercising each format (A through G).

isa_distribution.description: Number of vectors per ISA version.

RuntimeDescriptor.title: FLUX Runtime Descriptor
RuntimeDescriptor.description: Self-reported capabilities of a FLUX runtime implementation. Published by the runtime repo and consumed by the conformance framework to determine which vectors to run.

repository_url.description: URL of the runtime's source repository.

size_bytes.description: Fixed byte size of this format, or null for variable-length (e.g., Format G).

formats.description: Instruction formats implemented, with their byte sizes.

a2a.description: Supports A2A protocol operations (TELL, ASK, DELEGATE, BROADCAST).

jit.description: Whether the runtime has JIT compilation (affects timing comparisons).

error_types.description: Error types the runtime can produce (e.g., 'DivisionByZero', 'StackOverflow').

runner_command.description: Command to invoke the conformance runner (e.g., 'python runners/python/run_conformance.py --json').

float_tolerance.description: Default floating-point comparison tolerance for this runtime.

ConformanceReport.title: FLUX Conformance Report
ConformanceReport.description: Aggregated summary of conformance test results across one or more runtimes. Produced by collecting TestRunResult objects from individual runtime CI jobs.

report_version.description: Version of this report schema format.

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this report was generated.

suite_manifest_version.description: The manifest_version of the test suite used for this report.

pass_rate.description: Pass rate as percentage (passed / (total - skipped - errors) * 100).

memory_peak_bytes.description: Peak memory usage across all test runs, if measured.

category_breakdown.description: Pass/fail counts broken down by test category.

failed_vector_ids.description: IDs of vectors that failed (verdict = FAIL).

skipped_vector_ids.description: IDs of vectors that were skipped.

full_pass.description: Whether 95%+ of the full suite passed.

conformant.description: FLUX Conformant badge: true if p0_pass AND full_pass.

total_runtimes.description: Number of runtimes included in this report.

conformant_runtimes.description: Number of runtimes achieving FLUX Conformant status.

cross_runtime_consistent.description: Whether all conformant runtimes produce identical results for every vector.

runtimes.description: Runtime names involved in the divergence.

difference.description: Description of the divergence (e.g., 'flux-core returned R0=6, flux-runtime returned R0=7').

divergences.description: List of vectors where conformant runtimes disagree, indicating a specification ambiguity or implementation divergence.

v1_conformance.description: Overall pass rate for isa-v1 across all runtimes.

v2_conformance.description: Overall pass rate for isa-v2 across all runtimes.

vectors_available_v2.description: Number of vectors that have isa-v2 encodings.
